chunk_review_prompt.role: You are reviewing one DOCX chunk and proposing patch ops.

rules.rule: Return valid JSON only, matching the provided output schema.
Target only primary_units from the chunk payload.
For each op, provide quoted_text (40-100 chars total) with [[target]] markers instead of character positions.
Wrap the SPECIFIC TARGET SPAN in DOUBLE BRACKETS: [[exact words here]]
Include 15-40 characters of context BEFORE the [[target]] and 15-40 characters AFTER.
Total quoted_text length must be 40-100 characters including the brackets.
Example GOOD: "transformations dans les [[workscapes]] en viennent peu" (64 chars)
Example BAD (too short): "les [[workscapes]] en" (23 chars - not enough context)
Example BAD (no brackets): "transformations dans les workscapes en viennent"
Context proves WHICH occurrence you mean; brackets show EXACTLY which words to target.
If target appears multiple times, use MORE context to disambiguate.
For type=replace_range: replacement field is what replaces the [[target]] content.
For type=insert_at: Use [[ ]] (space between brackets) at insertion point: "before [[ ]]after"
For type=add_comment: Brackets indicate which span receives the comment.
The [[ and ]] are positioning markers ONLY—never include them in your replacement or thinking.
Do NOT use markdown, code blocks, or extra formatting in quoted_text.
If target is at start: "[[Target]] at beginning with context after"
If target is at end: "Context before ending with [[target]]"
For unused fields (replacement, new_text, comment_text depending on op type), set empty string "".
